recommendations.title: The Graduate
recommendations.overview: A disillusioned college graduate finds himself torn between his older lover and her daughter.

recommendations.title: Closer
recommendations.overview: The relationships of two couples become complicated and deceitful when the man from one couple meets the woman of the other.

recommendations.title: Wit
recommendations.overview: A renowned professor is forced to reassess her life when she is diagnosed with terminal ovarian cancer.

recommendations.title: Regarding Henry
recommendations.overview: After being shot, a lawyer loses his memory and must relearn speech and mobility, but he has a loving family to support him.

recommendations.title: Biloxi Blues
recommendations.overview: A Jewish teenager sets three goals: lose his virginity, become a writer, and survive World War II.

recommendations.title: Who's Afraid of Virginia Woolf?
recommendations.overview: A history professor and his wife entertain a young couple who are new to the university's faculty. As the drinks flow, secrets come to light, and the middle-aged couple unload onto their guests the full force of the bitterness, dysfunction, and animo

recommendations.title: The Birdcage
recommendations.overview: A gay cabaret owner and his drag queen partner agree to put up a false heterosexual front so that their son can introduce them to his fiancée's conservative parents.

recommendations.title: Wolf
recommendations.overview: An aging publisher becomes a demon wolf and, with this newfound youthful vigor, fights to keep his job.

recommendations.title: Working Girl
recommendations.overview: When a secretary's idea is stolen by her boss, she seizes an opportunity to steal it back by pretending she has her boss' job.

recommendations.title: Catch-22
recommendations.overview: A WWII military pilot makes a valiant effort to be certified insane in order to be excused from flying missions. But there's a catch.
